sn8.8:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehi. Tena kho pana samayena bhagavā bhikkhū nibbānapaṭisaṁyuttāya dhammiyā kathāya sandasseti samādapeti samuttejeti sampahaṁseti. Te ca bhikkhū aṭṭhiṁ katvā manasi katvā sabbacetasā samannāharitvā ohitasotā dhammaṁ suṇanti.
sn8.8:1.2: Atha kho āyasmato vaṅgīsassa etadahosi: "Ayaṁ kho bhagavā bhikkhū nibbānapaṭisaṁyuttāya dhammiyā kathāya sandasseti samādapeti samuttejeti sampahaṁseti. Te ca bhikkhū aṭṭhiṁ katvā manasi katvā sabbacetasā samannāharitvā ohitasotā dhammaṁ suṇanti. Yannūnāhaṁ bhagavantaṁ sammukhā sāruppāhi gāthāhi abhitthaveyyan"ti.
sn8.8:10.1: Pajjotakaro ativijjha,Sabbaṭṭhitīnaṁ atikkamamaddasa;Ñatvā ca sacchikatvā ca,Aggaṁ so desayi dasaddhānaṁ.
sn8.8:11.1: Evaṁ sudesite dhamme,Ko pamādo vijānataṁ dhammaṁ;Tasmā hi tassa bhagavato sāsane,Appamatto sadā namassamanusikkhe"ti.
sn8.8:2.1: Atha kho āyasmā vaṅgīso uṭṭhāyāsanā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā yena bhagavā tenañjaliṁ paṇāmetvā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "paṭibhāti maṁ, bhagavā, paṭibhāti maṁ, sugatā"ti.
sn8.8:2.3: Atha kho āyasmā vaṅgīso bhagavantaṁ sammukhā sāruppāhi gāthāhi abhitthavi:
sn8.8:6.1: Divāvihārā nikkhamma,satthudassanakamyatā;Sāvako te mahāvīra,pāde vandati vaṅgiso"ti.
sn8.8:7.1: "Kiṁ nu te, vaṅgīsa, imā gāthāyo pubbe parivitakkitā, udāhu ṭhānasova taṁ paṭibhantī"ti?
sn8.8:7.2: "Na kho me, bhante, imā gāthāyo pubbe parivitakkitā, atha kho ṭhānasova maṁ paṭibhantī"ti.
sn8.8:7.3: "Tena hi taṁ, vaṅgīsa, bhiyyoso mattāya pubbe aparivitakkitā gāthāyo paṭibhantū"ti.
sn8.8:7.4: "Evaṁ, bhante"ti kho āyasmā vaṅgīso bhagavato paṭissutvā bhiyyoso mattāya bhagavantaṁ pubbe aparivitakkitāhi gāthāhi abhitthavi:
sn8.8:8.1: "Ummaggapathaṁ mārassa abhibhuyya,Carasi pabhijja khilāni;Taṁ passatha bandhapamuñcakaraṁ,Asitaṁ bhāgaso pavibhajaṁ.
sn8.8:9.1: Oghassa nittharaṇatthaṁ,Anekavihitaṁ maggaṁ akkhāsi;Tasmiñce amate akkhāte,Dhammaddasā ṭhitā asaṁhīrā.
